summary: Tested light mode theme fix for My Account, Contact Detail, and UniversalShareModal. Theme toggle works correctly via localStorage. UniversalShareModal PASSES fully - uses dynamic theme colors. My Account and Contact Detail have PARTIAL fixes - main containers use theme colors but many internal sections still have hardcoded dark colors (#1C1C1E, #000, #FFF).

ui_bugs.issue: Lines 599-614: Period selector buttons (Today, This Week, etc.) have hardcoded backgroundColor '#1C1C1E' instead of colors.card
Lines 619-713: Custom date picker section uses hardcoded dark colors (#1C1C1E, #2C2C2E, #3A3A3C, #FFF)
Lines 722-893: Activity summary, stats cards, and CTR sections use hardcoded backgroundColor '#1C1C1E' and color '#FFF'
Line 542-550: tileBtnThird doesn't use colors.card, relies on StyleSheet default '#1C1C1E'
Lines 1883-2118: Multiple StyleSheet definitions have hardcoded dark colors that are not overridden by inline styles
statsRow style at line 1939 has backgroundColor '#1C1C1E'
heroChip style at line 1925 has backgroundColor '#1C1C1E'
feedLine, feedIcon, feedMessageBubble have hardcoded dark colors

action_items: my-account.tsx: Replace all inline hardcoded colors in My Activity section (lines 599-893) with colors.bg/colors.card/colors.text/colors.textSecondary from useThemeStore
contact/[id].tsx: Update StyleSheet definitions (lines 1883-2118) to use inline styles with theme colors, or create a separate hook to get dynamic styles
Both files: Ensure all #1C1C1E instances are replaced with colors.card, all #000 with colors.bg, all #FFF with colors.text
Consider creating a useThemedStyles hook that returns StyleSheet-like object with theme-aware colors
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: useThemeStore is correctly imported and colors extracted in all 3 files
PASS: Main container backgrounds use colors.bg correctly (my-account line 421, contact line 838, modal line 331)
PASS: UniversalShareModal fully implements theme colors for modal background, inputs, text, and borders
FAIL: My Account 'My Activity' section has ~150 lines with hardcoded dark colors not respecting light mode
FAIL: Contact Detail StyleSheet at bottom of file has ~100+ hardcoded color values
ISSUE: StyleSheet.create() values are static and cannot use theme colors dynamically - need inline styles or dynamic style generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle works via localStorage.setItem('theme_mode', 'light'). Light mode colors: bg=#F2F2F7, card=#FFFFFF, text=#1C1C1E. Dark mode: bg=#000000, card=#1C1C1E, text=#FFFFFF. The issue is that while main containers use colors.bg correctly, many internal sections in my-account.tsx and contact/[id].tsx still use hardcoded values in inline styles and StyleSheet definitions.

theme_toggle_menu.notes: Toggle switch on Menu page correctly switches between Dark Mode and Light Mode

failing: Custom date picker hardcoded dark colors
Activity summary/stats sections hardcoded dark colors

universal_share_modal_light_mode.notes: Modal fully respects light mode - white background, dark text, light gray inputs

dark_mode_still_works.notes: Verified dark mode toggle returns to correct dark theme colors
